creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214053
squid-devel.diff

Resurrect www/squid-devel as 5.x came into beta state
PR that should be committed first:
- https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=246138
- https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=246139

I strongly recommend you to review release note http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v5/squid-5.0.2-RELEASENOTES.html if you decide to upgrade

The most notable change for me was BDB deprecation in behalf of TDB.

Know issues:
- https://bugs.squid-cache.org/show_bug.cgi?id=5042
